typography.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight font-light text-gray-900
typography.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight font-normal text-gray-900
typography.label: text-xs tracking-[0.2em] uppercase font-semibold text-gray-500

components.cards: bg-white rounded-3xl border border-purple-50 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] p-8 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[0_20px_40px_rgb(124,77,255,0.08)] transition-all duration-300
components.glassmorphism: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/40 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(124,77,255,0.05)] backdrop-saturate-150

buttons.primary: bg-[#7C4DFF] text-white rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium hover:bg-[#651FFF] transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#B388FF] focus:outline-none
buttons.secondary: bg-purple-50 text-[#7C4DFF] rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium hover:bg-purple-100 transition-colors
